query:
UPDATE tasks SET
    title = ?,
    description = ?,
    "status" = ?,
    priority = ?,
    tags = ?,
    due_at = ?,
    start_at = ?,
    end_at = ?,
    dependencies = ?,
    "assignee_type" = ?,
    assignee_id = ?,
    project_id = ?,
    modified_by = ?,
    updated_at = ?
WHERE id = ?
